name: Nyalenda Drainage Master Plan
notes: Phase 1 (main collectors) complete. Phase 2 (Nyalenda B network) requires relocation of 800 structures. Underfunded by 55%.

name: Lake Victoria Shoreline Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Political resistance — lakefront land has high commercial value
notes: 30m riparian buffer mapped. Hotel and commercial construction within buffer ongoing. NEMA enforcement orders issued; not executed.

name: Nyando River Basin Early Warning System
blocking_factor: Last-mile SMS penetration in Nyando delta communities
notes: 8 gauges operational on Nyando. 6-hour advance warning achievable. Community alert chain incomplete for Kaloleni and Manyatta.

name: Obunga Settlement Upgrading
blocking_factor: Land tenure disputes in informal settlement
notes: SPA-equivalent designation applied for 2021. Survey complete. Title regularisation blocked by absentee landlord claims on 40% of plots.

name: Kisumu Integrated Stormwater Management
notes: German-funded design complete 2020. Blue-green infrastructure concept. Not gazetted. New CIDP 2023-2027 does not reference it.

name: Lake Victoria Water Level Monitoring Integration
notes: Real-time lake level data shared within LVBC. Not integrated into Kisumu County emergency management. Alert threshold for urban action not defined.

name: Port Florence Industrial Zone Drainage
notes: Port area drainage upgraded 2018. Industrial zone protection improved. Residential areas downstream not covered.

name: Kisumu Western Bypass Flood Culverts
notes: Design complete. 12 culverts undersized on original design — identified in 2023 review. Redesign pending.
